description: Property needs to be furnished before it can be listed on STR platforms. Lead is willing to invest but needs confidence in returns before spending on furnishing.
typical_timeline: 1-3 months for furnishing, depending on budget and availability
key_questions_to_ask: Do you have any furniture already?
Are you planning to use IKEA or a furnishing package?
Do you need guidance on what Airbnb guests expect?
what_to_do: Provide Stayful furnishing guidance and checklist
Give a clear income projection to justify the furnishing investment
Offer to advise on furnishing choices that photograph well
Set a realistic go-live date once furnishing is complete
what_not_to_do: leave them without guidance on what is needed
risk_factors: furnishing budget runs out before property is ready
income projection not compelling enough to justify investment
follow_up_cadence: Bi-weekly during furnishing period. Offer practical help to maintain momentum.

notable_leads.name: Robert
notable_leads.note: Certainty-seeker. Needs confidence in income before spending on furnishing.

notable_leads.name: Nicholas
notable_leads.note: Also DLY-PUR — purchasing the property first, then furnishing. Double delay.

notable_leads.name: Rona
notable_leads.note: Needs to furnish. Certainty-seeker. Send comparable furnished property income data to justify investment.
